value.found_quote: Custom prompts are deprecated. Use skills for reusable instructions that Codex can invoke explicitly or implicitly.
value.rationale: The fetched page is about "Custom Prompts" in Codex (a deprecated feature for reusable slash-command prompts in the CLI/IDE extension). It does not mention or describe prompt/context caching — the feature of caching repeated context to cut latency and cost. While "prompt caching" appears in the navigation sidebar as a suggested search term/link, the page itself contains no substantive content about that offering. The claim is not substantiated by this page.
